description: Model generation triggers skill with dbt best practices
input: Create a dbt model that transforms raw orders data into a customer_orders mart with revenue metrics
assertions: suggests proper materialization for marts (table or incremental)
follows naming convention fct_ or similar mart prefix

description: Testing request triggers test domain disclosure
input: Write data tests for my staging models to ensure referential integrity and uniqueness
assertions: includes unique and not_null test patterns
uses data_tests key (not deprecated tests key)
demonstrates relationships test for referential integrity

description: Semantic layer request triggers MetricFlow disclosure
input: Define MetricFlow semantic models and metrics for our revenue reporting and customer lifetime value tracking
assertions: includes semantic_models YAML with entities, dimensions, measures
includes saved queries for business reporting

description: dbt Mesh governance request triggers Mesh disclosure
input: Set up cross-project refs between our finance and marketing dbt projects with model contracts and access controls
assertions: demonstrates cross-project ref() syntax with project name

description: Incremental model optimization triggers analytics engineering + platform domains
input: Our incremental model is running slow and costing too much in warehouse credits. Optimize it for performance and cost.

description: General SQL question does NOT trigger skill
input: How do I write a SELECT statement that joins two tables and filters by date?
assertions: should be routed to a general SQL skill or answered without dbt specifics

description: Airflow orchestration question does NOT trigger skill
input: I need to schedule my dbt job in Airflow. How do I create a DAG that runs dbt build every morning at 6am?
assertions: does NOT trigger dbt-data-transformation skill for orchestration
may reference dbt CLI commands within orchestration context but primary skill should be pipeline/orchestration
if triggered, should only disclose Level 5 CLI command for dbt build, not full dbt skill
